hooks.command: REACHIFY_VERSION="$(tr -d '[:space:]' < "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/hooks/reachify.version")" bash "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/hooks/reachify-install.sh" 1>&2 && reachify login --id "${user_config.api_key}" --token "${user_config.api_token}" 1>&2 || echo "reachify-plugin: SessionStart setup failed — verify api_key/api_token config, network access, and that the installer put 'reachify' on PATH" >&2
